canonical_name: the last of the opposing group
your kinsman, but if he won favor at Arthur's court
my heir should never be my bodyguard
a little lad no taller than my sword hilt
anyone who had seen them both
the island home of her childhood
the island that coiled, from where they stood, like a sleeping dragon
those who were greedy for land
the gods of the heathen in Hell
the lads in the play yard
a woman who could give him so little
the road which led toward the castle
the room where her women slept
